description: Vectors the PII scrubber MUST redact (emails, IPv4, phone numbers). expectedRedacted replaces each match with [REDACTED:<kind>].

cases.input: call the on-call at +1 (555) 123-4567 if it breaks
cases.expectedRedacted: call the on-call at [REDACTED:phone] if it breaks

cases.input: no personal data here, just a build id 42
cases.expectedRedacted: no personal data here, just a build id 42
